complexity_reasons: Two known records only, no aggregation or batch filtering needed
No policy version ambiguity — 2025 version is current and applicable

audit_scope.question: R900008与R900009同日同额且费用类型相同，请核查是否属于重复报销；不同发票时不得误报
audit_scope.rule: 同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现构成重复报销（第十条）

data_questions.question: Are R900008 and R900009 using the same invoice?
Is either invoice used in more than one reimbursement?
data_questions.method: Check invoice usage for both FPDEV900008 and FPDEV900009

execution_steps.action: Retrieve expense details for R900008 and R900009
Retrieve applicable policy on duplicate reimbursement
Verify invoice usage for both invoices
Compare records and determine if duplicate reimbursement exists
Write audit report and final result

subagent_plan.reason: Complexity 1 — compact mode sufficient, no native subagent required

stopping_conditions: Invoice numbers are confirmed different → no duplicate reimbursement → 无异常
Invoice numbers are same → duplicate reimbursement confirmed → report anomaly
